name: Isik Plastik Sanayi ve Dis Ticaret Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi
summary: Isik Plastik Sanayi Ve Dis Ticaret Pazarlama Anonim Sirketi provides plastic products in Turkey. Its plastic products include solid polycarbonate and acrylic sheets, pet-G sheets, multi wall plates, sound barriers, non-glare sheets, flame retardant, and accessories; glasses, plates, cornered containers, caps, and viols; and masterbatch compounds. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Gebze, Turkey.
